title: Pop Up Friends with Hammer and Shape Sorter (assorted color)
features: Shape sorting fun - Match the colours & shapes
description: Product Description Multi coloured Pop Up Friends with Hammer. This wipe clean brightly coloured, reasonably priced toy will teach your little one hand and eye co-ordination, colours and different shapes. The large shapes on this product make it easy for little hands to pick up and play. By using the Tap Tap hammer to hit the small shapes at the bottom front of this item it will make the animal with the co-ordination shape pop up then hide again i.e. hit red circle then red circle on top will pop up to reveal a funny face (does not pop out to avoid any damage to children's eyes or face if too close). The larger removable shapes will also teach your child the difference between circles, triangles, squares, and hexagons. The different faces on each individual shape, cat, duck, bear, and dog will help them distinguish the different animals. Recommended Age from 18 months + Directions Use the Tap Tap hammer to hit the small shapes at the bottom front to make the corresponding animal's face pop up and hide again.
